Game.Name: American Tail, An - Fievel Goes West (Europe)
Game.plot: Overview:An American Tail: Fievel Goes West is an action platformer based on the Amblimation animated movie. The player, as Fievel, has to clean up the Wild West with his friend Tiger the cat. He is armed with a pop gun that can be switched with a water pistol (useful for putting out fires) and other upgrades, and must fight off the various cats and other enemies attempting to make life difficult for the mice population of America.The game should not be confused with the 1992 PC adventure game of the same name that focuses on the events of the same movie.
